title: A Phone Call to the City
learningGoal: The learner will accurately extract auditory information from a dialogue saturated with Present Continuous 'WH-Questions' (What are you doing? Where are you going?), decoding the inverted Subject-Verb interrogative structure.
instructions: Listen to a phone call between Rahul and his mother. His mother asks him a lot of questions about what he is doing RIGHT NOW. Listen carefully to the 'WH' question words (What, Where, Who) and Rahul's '-ing' answers. Answer the 8 questions.

contentItems.text: Notice how the mother says 'Where ARE you going?' instead of 'Where you are going?'. This is the English question flip!

listeningGoal: Parse rapid interrogative syntax and isolate Present Continuous verbal responses.
audioScenario: A mother calling her busy son in the city to check up on him.

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: Hello, Rahul. What are you doing?
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: हेलो, राहुल। वॉट आर यू डूइंग?
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: नमस्ते, राहुल। तुम क्या कर रहे हो?

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: Hi, Mom. I am walking on the street.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: हाय, मॉम। आई एम वॉकिंग ऑन द स्ट्रीट।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: नमस्ते, मॉम। मैं सड़क पर चल रहा हूँ।

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: Oh, are you going to work?
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: ओह, आर यू गोइंग टू वर्क?
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: ओह, क्या तुम काम पर जा रहे हो?

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: No, I am not working today. I am going to the park.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: नो, आई एम नॉट वर्किंग टुडे। आई एम गोइंग टू द पार्क।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: नहीं, मैं आज काम नहीं कर रहा हूँ। मैं पार्क जा रहा हूँ।

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: Where is your brother? Is he going with you?
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: वेयर इज़ योर ब्रदर? इज़ ही गोइंग विथ यू?
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: तुम्हारा भाई कहाँ है? क्या वह तुम्हारे साथ जा रहा है?

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: No, he is not. He is sleeping at home.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: नो, ही इज़ नॉट। ही इज़ स्लीपिंग एट होम।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: नहीं, वह नहीं है। वह घर पर सो रहा है।

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: Who are you meeting at the park?
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: हू आर यू मीटिंग एट द पार्क?
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: तुम पार्क में किससे मिल रहे हो?
मैं अमित से मिल रहा हूँ।
वह वहाँ क्या कर रहा है?

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: I am laughing because a dog is running after Amit's ball! I have to go, Mom.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: आई एम लाफिंग बिकॉज़ अ डॉग इज़ रनिंग आफ्टर अमित्स बॉल! आई हैव टू गो, मॉम।
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: मैं हंस रहा हूँ क्योंकि एक कुत्ता अमित की गेंद के पीछे दौड़ रहा है! मुझे जाना है, माँ।
ठीक है, तुम्हारा दिन शुभ हो।

audioTranscriptFull:
Mother: Hello, Rahul. What are you doing?
Rahul: Hi, Mom. I am walking on the street.
Mother: Oh, are you going to work?
Rahul: No, I am not working today. I am going to the park.
Mother: Where is your brother? Is he going with you?
Rahul: No, he is not. He is sleeping at home.
Mother: Who are you meeting at the park?
Rahul: I am meeting Amit.
Mother: What is he doing there?
Rahul: He is playing football.
Mother: Why are you laughing?
Rahul: I am laughing because a dog is running after Amit's ball! I have to go, Mom.
Mother: Okay, have a good day.

questionSet.questionText: What is the very first question the mother asks?
Where is Rahul going right now?
options: He is going to the park

questionSet.questionText: What is Amit doing at the park?
Why is Rahul laughing at the end of the call?
options: Because a dog is running after the ball
Because the mother made a joke

questionSet.questionText: Listen to the mother's question: 'Why are you laughing?'. Did she put the word 'are' BEFORE or AFTER the word 'you'?
True or False: Rahul is working today.

scoringRules.partialCreditRules: No partial credit for Q1, Q7, Q8.

correctAnswers.q2: He is going to the park
correctAnswers.q6: Because a dog is running after the ball

feedbackRules.onPass: Astounding! You were able to track the rapid WH-Questions and correctly identify every single '-ing' action happening in the dialogue.
feedbackRules.onFail: Keep trying! Ensure you playback the audio on Slow mode. Listen specifically for the 'ING' words to figure out what people are active doing.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good ear! Watch out for the question structure. In English questions, the helper verb jumps to the front: 'Why ARE you laughing?', not 'Why you are laughing?'.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: Mother: Hello, Rahul. What are you doing?... (matches full transcript)

hintText: Focus on the first word of the question. 'Who' means a person. 'Where' means a place. 'What' means a thing/action. 'Why' means a reason.
